name: indupack
documentation:
# mypackage

This is a Python package containing advanced functions for:

- Custom sorting of dictionaries
- Fibonacci sequence calculation using memoization
- Palindrome checking
- Matrix multiplication and inversion
- Prime number generation using the Sieve of Eratosthenes

# Installation

```bash
pip install InduPack

functions.name: InduPack.module1.compare_dicts
documentation: Compare two dictionaries based on the 'value' key.

functions.name: InduPack.module1.custom_sort_dicts
documentation: Sort a list of dictionaries based on the 'value' key.

functions.name: InduPack.module1.fibonacci
documentation: Calculate the nth Fibonacci number using memoization.

functions.name: InduPack.module1.is_palindrome
documentation: Check if a string is a palindrome.

functions.name: InduPack.module2.validate_matrices
documentation: Check if matrix multiplication is possible (i.e., A.columns == B.rows).

functions.name: InduPack.module2.matrix_multiply
documentation: Multiply two matrices A and B.

functions.name: InduPack.module2.sieve_of_eratosthenes
documentation: Generate all prime numbers up to 'limit' using the Sieve of Eratosthenes.
